title: Scope-aware output for tsk list and tsk ready
description: When multiple project/ folders are discovered, prefix or group output by project path. tsk ready aggregates across discovered projects.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Scope-aware list/ready output implemented in python/src/taskulus/issue_listing.py + dependencies.py and rust/src/issue_listing.rs + dependencies.rs. Verified by features/queries/queries.feature (project path prefixes) and features/dependencies/dependencies.feature (ready path prefixes) in behave/cucumber.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: list output indicates project path for issues when multiple projects exist; ready computes across all discovered projects.
